note: LIVE INCIDENT BANNER — large countdown timer added. Threshold restored to 150 min total elapsed since block 6,988 (was 120 in v96; CTO request to give the network more runway given that the inner PoW loop has been verified identical to the pre-merge binary at h<7000). Deadline hardcoded to absolute UTC timestamp 2026-05-03 07:31:47 UTC (block 6,988 timestamp + 150 min). Countdown anchored to absolute UTC so it is unaffected by page reloads. Color shifts: gold > 15 min remaining, orange < 15 min, red < 5 min. At deadline, displays 'EXECUTE NOW'. The countdown is informational — the operations team executes the isolation procedure (sudo systemctl stop sost-node; cp .pre-phase2-7100.bak sost-node; start) on the seed node. Probability >150 min purely from variance at pre-update hashrate ~480 H/s ≈ e^(-12) ≈ 1 in 165,000. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
